title: Adaptive-RAG: Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Question Answering

defines.name: Adaptive-RAG
defines.definition: An adaptive QA framework that dynamically selects among no-retrieval, single-step retrieval, and multi-step retrieval strategies based on query complexity.

problem: Existing retrieval-augmented QA methods are either too computationally expensive for simple queries or too weak for complex multi-step queries, so a one-size-fits-all strategy is inadequate.
